title: Craft The Uncraftable
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## About this mod
There are some items in Minecraft that are unecessarily rare, due to their lack of recipe, even ones that aren't that valuable such as the Saddle or Chainmail Armor. 

This mod aims to rectify this issue by adding recipes for these items, as well as some modifications, such as the recipe for buttons gives you 8 instead of 1.

## Some recipes
_Full recipe list: [here](https://github.com/herrobriam/craft-the-uncraftable/wiki)_.

![The trident recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d30a284b97217a471e393caa03791067c379b8c5.png)
![Chainmail boots recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0e4ee23907bc294efb4254d25366ed2a7f78f1e.png)
![Name tag recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ffe2db4ff095f22767b23e2643bac51f7ff044.png)
![Spawner recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f784ca857b813d7fbcedb4f60b36dbf771e5d47.png)
